project_type: TypeScript monorepo - Turborepo with pnpm workspaces, Next.js apps, shared packages
build_system: pnpm + Turborepo; packages use tsc, apps use next build; vitest for testing
test_framework: vitest (v2) - no global vitest.config in packages (uses default), quantai app has vitest.config.ts with environment: node
build_command: pnpm typecheck (runs turbo typecheck across all packages)
test_command: pnpm test (runs turbo test across all packages) - for targeted: pnpm --filter @quant/quant-tools test && pnpm --filter @quant/ai test && pnpm --filter @quant/quantai test
verification_instructions: 1. Run pnpm --filter @quant/quant-tools typecheck && pnpm --filter @quant/ai typecheck && pnpm --filter @quant/quantai typecheck, 2. Run pnpm --filter @quant/quant-tools test && pnpm --filter @quant/ai test && pnpm --filter @quant/quantai test, 3. Run pnpm --filter @quant/quant-tools lint && pnpm --filter @quant/ai lint && pnpm --filter @quant/quantai lint
setup_instructions: pnpm install in repo root (already done in workspace)
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full access. Node.js 22, pnpm 10.28.1 available. TypeScript strict mode with noUnusedLocals, noUnusedParameters, noUncheckedIndexedAccess, noImplicitOverride. ESM only (type: module). File extensions use .js in imports despite .ts source.
contribution_requirements: Work ONLY in packages/quant-tools, packages/quant-orchestrator, packages/ai, apps/quantai. Do NOT edit other apps, shared-ui, or CI config.
key_patterns: 1. Tool definitions use ToolDefinition interface with id format 'appname.action', appId, inputSchema, outputSchema, permissionTier, costEstimate, undoRecipe, tags. 2. Tests in src/__tests__/ using vitest (describe/it/expect). 3. Imports use .js extensions for ESM. 4. CrossAppOrchestrator wires IntentRouter + MultiStepPlanner + ToolExecutor + ContextManager. 5. SSE streaming from /api/ask route for real-time progress. 6. AI package has VoiceCommander using SpeechToTextService + UniversalAssistant + TextToSpeechService. 7. React components use framer-motion for animation, Tailwind CSS for styling.
directory_structure: packages/quant-tools/src/ - registry/, planner/, executor/, orchestrator/, permissions/, audit/, mcp/, undo/, tools/ (18 app tool files), __tests__/. packages/ai/src/ - voice/, assistant/, core/, services/, config/. apps/quantai/src/ - app/api/ (routes), components/, __tests__/, types/. packages/quant-orchestrator/src/ - orchestrator, intent-router, context-tracker, daily-brief, device-handoff, phone-free.
